name: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee time-off requests/month tool
description: For HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee time-off requests/month, delayed approvals cause employee dissatisfaction. We alert HR ops when approvals are pending beyond 3 days instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee time-off requests/month
problem_solved: Delayed approvals of employee time-off requests

locked_fields.primary_problem: Delayed approvals of employee time-off requests

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of time-off requests via spreadsheets
